title: hieracium obscuricapitatum subsp. obscuricapitatum
intro: Hieracium obscuricapitatum subsp. obscuricapitatum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Hieracium obscuricapitatum subsp. obscuricapitatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
